name: Bose
philosophy: Bose's web presence is the premium-audio brand's editorial chrome — black-and-white duotone product photography on a clean white canvas, restrained typography (Inter or Helvetica Neue), and a single accent color used only on CTAs. The atmosphere is hi-fi audio reverence; cards lean rectilinear, motion is restrained, and the product photography (headphones, speakers, soundbars) carries the prestige.

design_language.motion_signature: Editorial fade-ins on scroll, slow crossfade carousels (1.2s), no spring or scale animations. Hover on product cards triggers a subtle color shift (background to #fafafa) but no card lift.

trademark_signals: Premium black-and-white product photography on white — the audio gear as artifact
Helvetica Neue across chrome — no proprietary face, deliberate restraint
Rectilinear cards (0–8px radius) — the brand reads as hi-fi audio, not consumer-electronics-cute
Single dark CTA color (#1f1f1f) — minimalist primary action
Editorial product detail pages — long-scroll with technical specs and audio-engineering callouts
ai_slop_avoided: Don't add bright accent colors — the brand is monochrome with dark CTAs
Don't soften card radii above 8px — Bose reads as hi-fi precision, not soft-consumer
Don't stylize product photography with color filters — pure-white seamless is the brand
Don't add motion to product cards — editorial restraint is the prestige signal
